calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on the courts calendar on this day having been sent from Dept 206 for a small claims appeal. The Judge, Clerk Dennis D. Vegas, Plaintif Igor Giderman, Defendant John Griffin are present in court. Court and counsel argue the matter off of the record. Judgement is in favor of the Plaintiff San Francisco Toyta and against defendant John Griffin in the anount of $850.06.
